handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260406 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
client subscribe_group_events {"req_id":"$req1"}
server display_group_updated {"req_id":"$req1","contract_info":"none"}
client update_display_group {"req_id":"$req1"}
server display_group_updated {"req_id":"$req1","contract_info":"265598@SMART"}
client unsubscribe_group_events {"req_id":"$req1"}
disconnect
